results.content:

fmerian

Kilo Code

Kilo Code

📌

finally, an open-source alternative to @Ahrefs and @SEMrush. it's about time.

S/O to @bensenescu, keep up the great work. oss ftw!

Ben Senescu [...] Ben Senescu

Hello 👋   
  
This February, I was building other open source projects and wanted to do SEO.   
  
I was floored by how expensive and bloated the tools were. There weren't any modern open source solutions, so I figured I should just build that.  
  
Since then, it's been really cool seeing founders and agencies enjoy the product and even building their own custom features.   
  
Hope you give it a try: openseo.so. There are some trial credits to test it out, then it starts at $10/month.   
  
You can also self host on Cloudflare or with Docker.   
  
Give us a star on github or you can join the discord to get SEO advice, contribute, or just hang out.

results.content:
## Cloudflare Self-Hosting

### Deploy the Worker

Clicking this button opens a page to deploy OpenSEO in your Cloudflare account. If you do not have an account yet, it will take you to account creation first (OpenSEO works great on the free plan).

Reference these docs while deploying since the Cloudflare UI doesn't indicate what steps you need to take: `docs/SELF_HOSTING_CLOUDFLARE.md`.

## Local Development

See `docs/LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT.md`.

Contributions are very welcome.

 Open an issue for bugs, UX friction, or feature requests.
 Open a PR if you want to implement a feature directly.
 Community-driven improvements are prioritized, and high-quality PRs are encouraged.

If you want to contribute but are unsure where to start, open an issue and describe what you want to build. [...] Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

results.title: GitHub - every-app/open-seo: Open source alternative to ...
results.content:
Open SEO is an SEO tool for the people. If tools like Semrush or Ahrefs are too expensive or bloated, Open SEO is a pay as you go alternative that you actually control. Alone SEO tool for you and your AI agent. Connect with any agent like Claude code, Open Claude, or Hermes. We have pre-built skills, but you can build your own to tailor Open SEO to your needs. Apentis SEO is a hosted version of the app. If you are not interested in self-hosting or just want to support the project, we also have a hosted version. Check out Apentis SEO. Why use Open SEO? Best in class MCP and AI skills. Modern, simple UI that focuses on workflows instead of a bloated, complex SEO suite. No subscriptions. You bring your own data for SEO API key and pay only for what you use. Fork and tweak the code to create [...] # GitHub - every-app/open-seo: Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

### Description
74 views
Posted: 26 Jun 2026

 Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs. Contribute to every-app/open-seo development by creating an account on GitHub. [...] issue and describe what you want to build. Say all API cost reference, the data for SEO public docs and pricing pages say new accounts receive $1 free credit to test the API, and the minimum top up or payment is $50. This allows you to try Open SEO for free with a starter credit before deciding whether to top up. Pricing sources include the SERP API pricing page, the keywords data API pricing page, the backlinks pricing page, and the Lighthouse API documentation. Rank tracking estimates cost around $2 per month for 50 keywords, one device, and five pages deep. 10 pages deep costs eight times more than one page, and tracking both devices doubles the cost. Site audits cost about 1 cent per 20 pages audited with Lighthouse. Keyword research in the related mode has a current build pattern of
